meta.note: Returns Scores complement Freedom Scores. Scale: 0-100 raw, divided by 10 for display (1-10). Grades: A(90+), B(75-89), C(60-74), D(45-59), F(0-44).

reasoning.tokenUtility: Multiple utilities: staking for yield, compute access, agent services. Essential to protocol.
reasoning.valueAccrual: MOR burned for compute but burn minimal vs emissions. No fee distribution yet.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Fair launch, no insider allocation, 16-year decay. Moderate inflation.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Minimal external revenue. Compute marketplace active but emission-dependent.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: DEX-primary, limited CEX. Daily volume ~$30K. Very thin liquidity.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Payment for compute, staking for governance/security, validator requirement.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Take rate on compute fees. Staking rewards from inflation + fees. But take rate is small.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Uncapped supply with inflation. BME burn not yet active. Moderate dilution.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real customers using decentralized cloud. Revenue growing, still emission-heavy.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Tier-2 CEX listings. Moderate DEX liquidity. $1-5M daily volume.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Staking required for participation. Burn for registration. Governance. Essential.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Stake to participate. No direct fee distribution. dTAO creates market-based allocation.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Bitcoin model: 21M cap, halving done. Fair launch technically. Strong.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: No external revenue. Entirely emission-driven. Subnets compete for emissions.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Binance, Coinbase, Kraken. $100M+ daily volume. Highly liquid.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Payment for render services. Staking exists but unclear purpose. Limited governance.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Burn mechanism for services. Real Hollywood customers. Proven demand.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Capped but foundation holds significant tokens. Inflation through rewards.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real revenue from real customers. Product-market fit demonstrated.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Major CEX listings. Good DEX liquidity. $50M+ daily volume.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Token used for enterprise LCR product. Users earn via bandwidth sharing.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Enterprise demand buys tokens. But foundation controls revenue flows opaquely.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: 1B cap. Team/investor allocation significant. Wide airdrop but insider heavy.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real enterprise customers (AI companies). Growing revenue.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Payment for compute, staking for providers. But centralized platform.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Unclear mechanism. Platform takes fees but how much flows to token?
reasoning.supplyDynamics: 800M cap. Significant insider allocation. Inflation through rewards.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Binance listing. But volume has declined significantly since launch.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Staking for discounted inference. Access to pro features required.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Burn mechanism for API calls. Growing user base drives demand.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Fixed supply. Airdrop launch. But team allocation unclear.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Privacy-focused inference with real users. Revenue model emerging.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Good liquidity on Base and major CEX. $50M+ daily volume.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Staking for agent rewards, bonding, governance. Real utility exists.
reasoning.valueAccrual: $89K marketplace turnover. 99.6% token decline. Mechanics not working.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: 1B cap with 42.65% insider allocation. No enforced vesting.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Thin liquidity. Daily volume <$1M. 99% drawdown hurts.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Framework is great. Token connection is weak. Speculative.
reasoning.valueAccrual: No clear mechanism. Framework adoption doesn't drive token value.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: No revenue model for token. Framework is open source.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Multi-chain. Volume declined 99.7% from ATH. Thin.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Staking, governance, service payment. But merger created confusion.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Messy merger with Ocean withdrawal. Unclear post-merger mechanics.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: 2.71B cap. Merger-diluted. Ocean lawsuit over token sales.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real agent framework but usage metrics opaque. Centrally operated.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Major CEX listings. Good liquidity. $30-50M volume.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Pre-token. Intended for compute payment and staking.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: 10B cap with 54.6% insider allocation. Heavy dilution.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Not yet tradeable. Score based on VC backing and expected listing.

reasoning.valueAccrual: Conceptual. Whitepaper only. No working implementation.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Planned 21M cap mimicking Bitcoin. Scarcity model.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: No blockchain, no token, no revenue. Models are free.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Staking, governance, chain fees. Strong L1 utility.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Fee burn mechanism (70%). But AI value capture unclear.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: No max supply, inflationary. But controlled via burn.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: $115M TVL. Real chain usage. AI pivot is recent.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Tier-1 CEX. High liquidity. $100M+ daily volume.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Foundation says 'no intended utility value'. Data token use cases limited.
reasoning.valueAccrual: 81% converted to FET. No clear path for remaining OCEAN.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Fragmented after ASI withdrawal. Litigation over $120M.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Compute-to-Data is great tech. But token economics broken.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Major CEX but declining. Post-merger confusion.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Payment for confidential compute. Staking. Worker bonding.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Fee mechanism exists but centralized service dominates.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: 1B cap. Inflationary via staking rewards. Moderate allocation.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real product. Growing enterprise interest. Early stage.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Tier-2 CEX. Moderate liquidity. <$5M daily volume.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Planned for Sahara Chain. Currently on Ethereum/BNB.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real data labelling business. But not on-chain.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Tier-1 CEX (Binance). But 81% below ATH. Weak.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Data DAO staking, governance, data contribution rewards.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Data contributed earns tokens. But model unproven at scale.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Foundation controls treasury. Permissioned validators. 95% price decline.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Real user adoption for data contribution. Early traction.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Major CEX. Good initial liquidity. But volume declining.

reasoning.tokenUtility: Agent launchpad. Bonding curve participation. Governance.
reasoning.valueAccrual: Fee capture from launches. But agent tokens are speculative.
reasoning.supplyDynamics: Fixed supply. But launchpad dynamics dilute participants.
reasoning.revenueSustainability: Dominant launchpad with real revenue. 97% revenue collapse from peak.
reasoning.liquidityAccess: Base chain. Good liquidity. But speculative dynamics.

A.description: High Freedom + High Returns (ideal, doesn't exist yet)

B.description: High Freedom + Low Returns (sovereignty plays, early-stage)

C.description: Low Freedom + High Returns (profitable but centralized)
